calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-28-2008 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-28-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff Community Housing Partnership. Barbara Leahy, authorized agent for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined by Mr. Rossoff.
No appearance by defendants Cecilia Ollison, Sylvia Morgan and Andrea Smith.
The plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1: Lease Agreement dated 10/4/00.................................. ID/EV
Exhibit 2: Amended Three Day Notice dated 11/14/07- - - - - - - - - - - - -ID/EV

After hearing the testimony and evidence presented by the plaintiff, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP, a California nonprofit corporation, and against the Defendants CECILIA OLLISON, SYLVIA MORGAN and ANDREA SMITH as follows:

Plaintiff shall recover from defendants CECILIA OLLISON, SYLVIA MORGAN AND ANDREA SMITH Rents and Per Diem Damages in the sum of $3,258.08.
Plaintiff COMMUNITY HOUSING PARTNERSHIP is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1139-B Ozbourn Court, San Francisco, CA 94130. The lease is forfeited.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-22-2008 Continued To Jan-28-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Off Calendar

LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY ROBERT KANE FOR DEFENDANT CECILIA OLLISON; SYLVIA MORGAN; AND ANDREA SMITH
